Box Gutter Sizing
Recommended: 300mm width
Profile: 100mm deep × 70mm back × 130mm front

Structure 2 Coverage

If the garage/carport is narrower than the patio, set its width and which side it sits on. The exposed section gets a support post.

Customer Preview Generator ▾

                

                    

                        Generate a photorealistic image for your customer using AI.
                    

                    

                        
                        
                    

                    

                        
3D Screenshot (right-click to save):

                        
                    

                    

                        

                            ✔ Prompt copied to clipboard!


                            In Gemini:

                            1. Upload the 3D screenshot (saved above)

                            2. Optionally upload a site photo for realistic compositing

                            3. Paste the prompt (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V)

                            4. Hit Generate


                            Tip: Without a site photo, Gemini will generate a typical Perth suburban house as backdrop.
